Created attachment 185175
compiler intermediates

I attach a tar containing the generated .mi and .s files, which I hope are what needed.

I also may add that gcc 6.4.0 compiled GNUstep quite fine on Debian, both x86 as ppc!

gcc7 is only available as gcc7-devel. What is the difference? Just being cautious? I will build the package though and try.
